name: kkss
description: Cross-platform desktop application for pre- and post-processing Kratos Multiphysics simulations, built on the CAD-Preview and VSCode-MDPA-Preview extensions.
author: Vicente Mataix Ferrándiz

scripts.submodules:install: npm ci --prefix cad && npm ci --prefix mesh
scripts.submodules:build: npm run build --prefix cad && npm run package --prefix mesh
scripts.build:app: node esbuild.mjs && node tools/gen-webview-html.mjs && node tools/check-theme-vars.mjs
scripts.build: npm run submodules:build && npm run build:app
